title: Connect and Operate MCP in Codex and Claude · Extension Lens: Claude Config
summary: Configure one safe server in both Codex and Claude Code. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext claude config increment in cross-client MCP configuration and smoke tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure Claude Code local, project, or user MCP scope and review shared server trust.
Configure scoped Codex STDIO or HTTP servers, timeouts, tools, approvals, and authentication.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
